title: CH42 1LQ, Essar Oil (UK) Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/TP3301MD/V004
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Essar Oil (UK) Limited Installation name: Tranmere Oil Terminal Permit number: EPR/TP3301MD/V004  "
